void.string: <process description="modelName=com.landray.kmss.km.review.model.KmReviewTemplate&modelKey=reviewMainDoc&templateId=route-unmapped-formula-template&lbpmTmpId=route-unmapped-formula-lbpm" fdId="route-unmapped-formula-process"> <nodes> <startNode id="N1" name="Start"/> <reviewNode handlerIds="$组织架构.解释角色线$($流程.获取节点实际处理人$("N27"), "公司级分管领导", "分管领导")" handlerNames="$组织架构.解释角色线$($流程.获取节点实际处理人$("N27"), "公司级分管领导", "分管领导")" handlerSelectType="formula" id="N7" name="分管领导"/> <endNode id="N3" name="End"/> </nodes> <lines> <line endNodeId="N7" id="L1" startNodeId="N1"/> <line endNodeId="N3" id="L2" startNodeId="N7"/> </lines> </process>
